message:
feat(decision): implement composite-hypothesis testing (mixture SPRT / GLR)

Add composite_test.rs module with:
- MixtureSprtState: sequential testing with composite H1 (mixture over parameters)
- mixture_sprt_bernoulli: Beta-Bernoulli mixture SPRT
- mixture_sprt_beta_sequential: proper Bayesian sequential updates
- glr_bernoulli: Generalized Likelihood Ratio test
- mixture_sprt_multiclass: 4-class model (good vs bad composite)
- CompositeEvidenceAggregator: combine e-values from multiple tests
- needs_composite_test: determine when simple SPRT is insufficient

All functions emit e-values compatible with e-FDR/alpha-investing.
35 unit tests pass.

Implements process_triage-p15.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
